context_notes: Phase 3 and the v1.0 UI refactor milestone are implemented, verified, marked complete, UI-reviewed, browser_harness tested, and the `Tiền sân NaN ₫` finding is fixed. Full browser_harness screenshot sweep captured 14 screenshots grouped under /home/phatngo/.copilot/session-state/07dceea9-e423-4717-900e-03af338018ed/files/browser-harness-20260527-full-screens. The only actionable sweep finding was session detail `Tiền sân NaN ₫`; fixed in bad7cc0 and retested with browser_harness on mobile/desktop. Phase 3 UI review priority findings were fixed in 38778c0 and a direct style regression was fixed in 16608b0. Fresh UI re-audit score is 19/24 with remaining findings: typography token drift, SessionDetailView error feedback, and compact/icon-only accessibility/tap-target gaps. Security gate remains pending before archive because workflow.security_enforcement is true and no 03-SECURITY.md exists.
